hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into one jurisdiction-specific workflow to manage onboarding, Travel Rule operations, regulatory rules and audit-ready case evidence for Singapore crypto businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Crypto businesses often face fragmented compliance checks that do not align with Singapore’s unique regulatory expectations. This leads to slow onboarding, inconsistent rule application and gaps in audit evidence for jurisdiction-specific oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific rules, provider outputs, case workflows and audit evidence into one operating layer tailored for Singapore-focused VASPs to streamline onboarding, decision consistency and regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors jurisdiction-specific regulatory changes, maps updates to internal policies, and supports rule configuration to maintain consistent Singapore crypto compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented workflows. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific compliance outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and audit-ready evidence to support Singapore crypto business operations effectively.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports Singapore-focused VASPs with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence preservation, bank due diligence preparation, and enterprise-grade deployment governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Singapore VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports Singapore VASPs by connecting multiple compliance checks into connected workflows aligned with local regulations, enabling structured onboarding, risk monitoring, case management and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Singapore Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule data routing, exception handling and case escalation according to Singapore-specific policies, embedding messaging within broader compliance processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive evidence including case records, decision logs and provider outputs to support audit readiness and regulatory review for Singapore jurisdictional requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Singapore providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to consolidate their outputs into a single compliance operating layer tailored for Singapore compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but orchestrates their outputs into structured reviews, case evidence and reports for enhanced operational control.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects onboarding, Travel Rule, and regulatory outputs into audit-ready cases and controls for Singapore VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
